title: 3,000+ Tokens Per Second? Let's Stress Test Xiaomi's New Model: MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed
summary: Xiaomi and TileRT released a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model achieving over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The system combines selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a TileRT persistent GPU kernel runtime to optimize inference throughput.
writeup: Better Stack stress tests MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model from Xiaomi and TileRT that reaches over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The video traces the throughput to three combined techniques: selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and TileRT, a persistent GPU kernel runtime. The focus is inference optimization, showing how sparse expert activation paired with reduced-precision math and kernel-level runtime changes pushes decoding speed on a trillion-parameter model.
